user.title: Yuno Energy
user.description: Enter the encrypted Yuno mobile-app credentials and static headers captured from your own app traffic.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Yuno Energy
reauth_confirm.description: Update the encrypted credentials or static headers captured from your own app traffic.

reconfigure.description: Update the encrypted credentials, static headers, or polling interval.

error.cannot_connect: Yuno login failed. Check the encrypted credentials and static headers.
error.missing_basic_auth: Provide either a Basic Authorization header or a Basic username and password.
